summary: Completed comprehensive testing of tattoo shop directory MVP. Backend APIs fully functional with 355 shops imported. Frontend loads correctly with cyberpunk design implemented. Critical issue: webpack dev server overlay blocking interactive elements.

ui_bugs.issue: Webpack dev server error overlay intercepting pointer events, preventing clicks on buttons and links

integration_issues.issue: Clipboard write permission denied error in browser

passed_tests: All 21 backend API endpoints working correctly
Shop data import successful (355 shops, 187 cities, 27 states)
Homepage loads with proper cyberpunk design
Directory page displays shops with filters
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix webpack dev server overlay issue blocking UI interactions. The error overlay is preventing users from clicking buttons, links, and interactive elements. This is a critical blocker for user functionality.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - UI loads but interactions blocked by overlay
